description: Luxury living without the luxury price tag. 2,188 sq. ft., 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, single story, 2-car garage. Designed with growing families in mind, this beautiful single-story home offers the perfect balance of comfort, style, and affordability. Why continue paying high rent when you could invest in a home that gives you space, stability, and elevated living? Step into custom-grade  finishes, a thoughtfully designed layout, and a welcoming community filled with resort-style amenities and a friendly atmosphere you'll love coming home to. Affordable luxury meets everyday functionality in a home built for memories, entertaining, and your next chapter.

A home that just makes sense 脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗垄脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聙脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聰 designed the way a home is truly intended to feel. 4 spacious bedrooms and 5 spa-inspired bathrooms, a private office for productivity, an elegant dining room for unforgettable gatherings, and a media room plus game room made for entertaining. A huge backyard with endless possibilities, custom grade finishes throughout, super low tax rate, and zoned to exemplary schools. This isn't just square footage 脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗垄脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聙脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聰 it's space for legacy, laughter, and living well.

Luxury living with space to entertain and relax. 4 spacious bedrooms, 3 beautiful bathrooms, and an entertainment room designed for movie nights and game days. This home blends custom-grade finishes with thoughtful design, creating the perfect space for family, friends, and unforgettable gatherings. Step outside and enjoy resort-style amenities including a lazy river, scenic walking trails, and community spaces that make every day feel like a getaway. A home that offers comfort, style, and a lifestyle you deserve.
